mapper.select: SELECT ID, COMP_CD, REF_TYP, REF_ID, FILE_NM, STOR_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, CONTENT_TYP, REMARK, REG_ID, TO_CHAR(REG_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT FROM CM_ATTACH WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND REF_TYP=#{refTyp} AND REF_ID=#{refId} ORDER BY ID
SELECT ID, COMP_CD, REF_TYP, REF_ID, FILE_NM, STOR_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, CONTENT_TYP, REG_ID FROM CM_ATTACH WHERE ID=#{id} AND DEL_YN='N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CM_ATTACH (COMP_CD, REF_TYP, REF_ID, FILE_NM, STOR_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, CONTENT_TYP, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{refTyp}, #{refId}, #{fileNm}, #{storNm}, #{filePath}, NVL(#{fileSize},0), #{contentTyp}, #{remark}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE CM_ATTACH SET DEL_YN='Y' WHERE ID=#{id}
